basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 30 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 30 Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Preferably below 35 years for UR candidates. Age relaxation applicable for OBC, SC/ST & PwD candidates.
age_limit.details: Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: OBC: As per norms SC/ST: As per norms PwD: As per norms

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in appropriate branch, with a very good academic record throughout.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Ph.D. with first class or equivalent (in terms of grades, etc.) at the preceding degree in appropriate branch, with a very good academic record throughout. Good CPI/CGPA/Percentage in Ph.D course work where ever applicable. Experience: Grade-II (Contract): Less than three years of post-Ph.D industrial/ research/ teaching experience. Grade I (Regular): At least three years of post-Ph.D industrial/ research/ teaching experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Assistant Professor Grade-II: Min Basic Pay ₹70900/-. Assistant Professor Grade-I: Min Basic Pay ₹101500/-.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Ph.D. with first class or equivalent (in terms of grades, etc.) at the preceding degree in appropriate branch, with a very good academic record throughout. Good CPI/CGPA/Percentage in Ph.D course work where ever applicable. Experience: Grade-II (Contract): Less than three years of post-Ph.D industrial/ research/ teaching experience. Grade I (Regular): At least three years of post-Ph.D industrial/ research/ teaching experience.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: OBC: As per norms SC/ST: As per norms PwD: As per norms

rows.event: Closing date for submission of online application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application for Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) posts at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is 31-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 30 vacancies for the Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) posts in the current recruitment drive at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) positions at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is Online. Candidates must apply through the official portal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The age limit for UR candidates is preferably below 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC, SC/ST, and PwD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in an appropriate branch, along with a very good academic record throughout.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Assistant Professor Grade-I at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The minimum basic pay for Assistant Professor Grade-I is ₹101500/- at 7th CPC Pay Level 12. Total emoluments are approximately ₹2,11,196/- including NPS.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job location for Assistant Professor positions at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The job location for the Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) posts is Dhanbad, Jharkhand, which is where the Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) is situated.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website to apply for the Assistant Professor (Grade - I/II) recruitment at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is https://fr.iitism.ac.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the full form of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad stands for Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad, a premier educational institution in India.
